text:
(In reply to Roger Pau MonnÃ© from comment #16)

I've done just over 100 migrations with "inittodr(time_second);" added back in and I haven't seen any calcru warnings.

Obviously I can't guarantee it's fixed - but that's over twice as many migrates [worst case] as it took to make them appear before.

-Karl
